channel.title: Comments on: Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sharon Pucher
item.dc:creator: Sharon Pucher
item.description:
Paul,
Wow! I'm really impressed.
Sharon

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Thanks Mark, we're still patently waiting and hoping for at least one yes! If not, we'll keep trying - it will happen!
item.content:encoded: Thanks Mark, we’re still patently waiting and hoping for at least one yes! If not, we’ll keep trying – it will happen!

item.title: By: Mark
item.dc:creator: Mark
item.description: Paul - I'm waiting for the big announcement when one of the networks picks up your show. It will happen. You are doing great.
item.content:encoded: Paul – I’m waiting for the big announcement when one of the networks picks up your show. It will happen. You are doing great.
